name: Mckenna Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 30 Inch Height - LIT4527 - Bronze - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the McKenna table lamp set of 2. Each lamp stands an elegant 30 inches tall and features a sophisticated bronze finish that complements any decor. Crafted from ceramic marble, these lamps offer a stunning blend of style and substance. With their sleek design, they add a touch of elegance to living rooms, bedrooms, or offices. Ideal for providing ambient lighting, the McKenna lamps create a cozy atmosphere perfect for reading or relaxing. Their timeless appeal ensures they enhance any space with grace and allure. Add the McKenna table lamp set to your home to transform any room with a warm, inviting glow.
